Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-07-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff General Electric Capital Corporation, a corporation.
No appearance by defendants Financial Alchemy, Inc., a California corporation, or Jean-Marc Landau, an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendants on April 10, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 10, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff General Electric Capital Corporation, a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Financial Alchemy, Inc., a California corporation, and Jean-Marc Landau, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $51,128.73.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,258.39.
Attorney's Fees - $1,500.00.
Costs - $454.10, for a total judgment in the amount of $57,341.22.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
